title: TAJBank Closing Gong Ceremony in commemoration of the listing of the N10 billion Mudarabah Sukuk issuance
description: The closing Gong Ceremony in commemoration of the listing of the N10 billion Mudarabah Sukuk issuance sponsored by TAJBank Limited at NGX on Tuesday 14 February 2023 in Lagos.
html: The closing Gong Ceremony in commemoration of the listing of the N10 billion Mudarabah Sukuk issuance sponsored by TAJBank Limited at NGX on Tuesday 14 February 2023 in Lagos.
